title: U.S. becomes India’s top gas supplier, as Iran war cuts it off from the Gulf
summary_full: India's gas purchases from the U.S. have grown steadily, driven by Washington’s push to sell more American energy to the South Asian country.
summary_public: India's gas purchases from the U.S. have grown steadily, driven by Washington’s push to sell more American energy to the South Asian country.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war cuts it off from the Gulf
